heading: Procedure for hearing and determination
label: 30907 Procedure for hearing and determination
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30907(a)46 App.:743 (1st, 4th sentences).(1st, 4th–6th sentences), .Mar. 9, 1920, ch. 95, § 341 Stat. 52630907(b)46 App.:743 (5th, 6th sentences).In subsection (a), the text of 46 App. U.S.C. 743 (4th sentence) is omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b)(1)(A), the words “plaintiff” and “complaint” are substituted for “libelant” and “libel”, respectively, for consistency with the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure (28 App. U.S.C.).In subsection (b)(2), the words “in any proper case” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30907(a)46 App.:743 (1st, 4th sentences).(1st, 4th–6th sentences), .Mar. 9, 1920, ch. 95, § 341 Stat. 52630907(b)46 App.:743 (5th, 6th sentences).In subsection (a), the text of 46 App. U.S.C. 743 (4th sentence) is omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b)(1)(A), the words “plaintiff” and “complaint” are substituted for “libelant” and “libel”, respectively, for consistency with the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure (28 App. U.S.C.).In subsection (b)(2), the words “in any proper case” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: A civil action under this chapter shall proceed and be heard and determined according to the principles of law and the rules of practice applicable in like cases between private parties.

children.label: A
children.text: the plaintiff elects in the complaint; and

children.label: B
children.text: it appears that an action in rem could have been maintained had the vessel or cargo been privately owned and possessed.

children.heading: .—Effect on relief in personam
children.label: 2 .—Effect on relief in personam
children.text: An election under paragraph (1) does not prevent the plaintiff from seeking relief in personam in the same action.
